'''Aridka''' was a rocky [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that served as a [[Battle of Aridka|battleground]] between [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The planet was covered in abandoned [[Temple city|cities]], which were surrounded by cliffs and the ruins of [[temple]]s and [[obelisk]]s. At least two types of flora grew on the planet, in the crevices of the cliffs as well as in the city.<ref name="One Battle" />

{{Planet-stub}}
